reasoning: Query specifies Kurokawa Onsen (Aso region) and 湯巡り手形 (bath-hopping pass) for couples. Response returns onsen_ryokan for all of Kumamoto prefecture, with no hotel in the Kurokawa area — top results are in Kamitenshima (upper-middle) and Yamazumi-mura. 湯巡り手形 constraint is entirely ignored. RULE B: worst dim is constraint_handling (city + feature both missed).
missing_data: Hotels located in Kurokawa Onsen village (南小国町/黒川温泉); mention or filtering by 湯巡り手形 eligibility; couple-oriented filter.
improvement_hint: Add municipality-level filtering for 黒川温泉 / 南小国町 and surface hotels that participate in the 湯巡り手形 scheme if that data is available; otherwise note data gap.

reasoning: Query specifies Hakone onsen ryokan with anniversary packages and private baths. Response returns Kanagawa prefecture-level hotels, mixing Hakone-area hotels with Yugawara hotels (35.14-35.16°N), which are a different onsen resort area 25+ km away. Private bath (貸切風呂) and anniversary package constraints are not addressed. RULE B: constraint_handling is worst dim (location drift + feature gap).
missing_data: Hotels strictly in Hakone town; private bath (貸切風呂) attribute; anniversary package information.
improvement_hint: Add municipality filter for 箱根町 to exclude Yugawara; expose private_bath or kasetsu_buro attribute so agents can filter for the constraint.

reasoning: Query asks for a romantic walking course around Kasuga Taisha / Todai-ji in Nara city. Response returns spots for far-flung Nara municipalities (御杖村 stamp rally, 五條市 disused railway, 天理市, 橿原市, 山添村) with no results from Nara city's main sightseeing area. The q='散策' search retrieved prefecture-wide stale municipal announcements, completely missing the requested area. Worst dim: intent_understanding — correct region was not retrieved at all.
missing_data: Spots from Nara city center (奈良市): 春日大社, 東大寺, 鹿苑, ならまち area; walking route suggestions.
improvement_hint: Add municipality='奈良市' filter or tighten q-search to landmark names; deduplicate recurring portal-page results (same id appears three times in different municipality slots).

reasoning: Query asks about secluded beaches on remote Okinawa islands for a honeymoon. Response retrieves beach-tagged spots from Okinawa prefecture but results include Urasoe city beach cleanup event, volleyball camp news, and Kumejima municipality record (not a beach spot). Only one item (Miyakojima beach page) is remotely useful. The query's key constraint — remote island + secluded — is not addressed. RULE C: authoritative data present but scope/filter gap → affected dims 3, not 2, but intent and constraint are both 2 due to noise dominating useful content.
missing_data: Named secluded beaches on specific remote islands (波照間島, 黒島, 竹富島 etc.); island-by-island comparison.
improvement_hint: Filter get_spots results to remove non-attraction types (municipal events, news pages); add island-level municipality breakdown for Okinawa remote island queries.

reasoning: Query is in Spanish asking for traditional ryokan near Gion, Kyoto with kaiseki dinner — language is Spanish but response is Japanese/English data with no Spanish content (RULE D: -1 on constraint_handling). Gion proximity constraint not filtered: results include Capsule Ryokan (inappropriate for honeymoon), OYO ビジネス旅館, and a record with no name ('Ryokan'). Kaiseki dinner attribute absent. Per RULE B, constraint_handling is worst dim (language mismatch + location + feature gap).
missing_data: Spanish-language content or at least bilingual names; Gion-district proximity filter; kaiseki dinner attribute.
improvement_hint: Apply RULE D: return descriptions in requested language when available; add district-level proximity filter for Gion; expose meal_plan or kaiseki attribute in hotel records.

reasoning: Query asks for promenade walks and resort accommodations in Karuizawa for an anniversary. Response returns Nagano prefecture spots assigned to 軽井沢町 municipality code but content is from go-nagano.net portal covering Suzaka, Hakuba, and general Nagano topics — not Karuizawa-specific spots. Promenade (雲場池, 旧軽井沢銀座, 白糸の滝 etc.) are absent. Real Karuizawa content is buried or absent. RULE B: ranking/retrieval failure — relevant Karuizawa data not surfaced.
missing_data: Karuizawa walking spots (雲場池, 旧軽井沢銀座散策道, ハルニレテラス); resort hotels (星野リゾート系など); 遊歩道 walking trail information.
improvement_hint: Improve municipality scrape for Karuizawa town so spot content matches the actual municipality; de-prioritize portal homepage articles that describe distant locations.

reasoning: Query asks for onsen ryokan near Towada Lake in Aomori. Response correctly returns Aomori onsen ryokan including Sukayu (Hakkoda area, relatively near Towada) and Tsuta Onsen (close to Towada). However, no hotel is labeled as near Towada Lake specifically, and several results (おおま温泉, ごしょがわら温泉) are far from Towada (40+ km). Proximity constraint to Towada is not addressed. RULE C: authoritative data present, partial scope gap; constraint_handling is worst dim per RULE B.
missing_data: Hotels specifically near Towada Lake (十和田湖周辺); Towada proximity labels or distance info.
improvement_hint: Add geo-proximity filtering so hotels can be sorted by distance from a named landmark like 十和田湖; expose location context field.

reasoning: Query asks for couple spots and accommodation on Taketomi Island (竹富島). Response correctly returns 竹富島 as top spot with preservation_district and couple suitable_for tags, and 西表石垣国立公園. However no accommodation (hotel/minshuku on Taketomi) is returned — the tool is get_spots, not get_hotels, so hotels are absent. Also includes administrative/irrelevant scrape records (マイナンバー手続き). Authoritative spot data present, partial scope per RULE C.
missing_data: Accommodation on Taketomi Island (must use get_hotels separately); star-gazing spots specific to Taketomi; white-sand road (コンドイビーチ, 星砂の浜) named spots.
improvement_hint: Combine get_spots + get_hotels in a single aggregated response for islands; filter out clearly non-tourism municipal admin records.

reasoning: Query is in Vietnamese asking for romantic ryokan or spots in Kanazawa. Response is in Japanese/English (RULE D: -1 on constraint_handling from otherwise 3). Response returns Ishikawa prefecture ryokan, with Asadaya — a well-known Kanazawa ryokan — at the top. However several hotels are in Noto area (のと旅館, やまもと旅館 at 37.3°N vs Kanazawa at 36.5°N). No Vietnamese content. Per RULE D, constraint_handling is worst dim.

improvement_hint: Apply RULE D language fallback; add city-level filtering to restrict results to Kanazawa city proper vs Noto Peninsula.

reasoning: Query asks for onsen ryokan in Yufuin (湯布院) with a view of Mt. Yufu for a honeymoon. Response returns Oita prefecture hotels, but top results are in Kujū-machi (九重町) not Yufuin. RULE B: constraint_handling worst (city + view constraint both missed).

reasoning: Query asks for ryokan near Matsumoto Castle. Response returns Nagano prefecture hotels with several in 松本市安曇 area (Kamikochi side) — 神嶽の湯, 中の湯温泉, 坂巻温泉 are in the Kamikochi/Azumi area, not Matsumoto city center near the castle. Dormy Inn Matsumoto is present and city-center. Castle proximity constraint partially missed. RULE C: authoritative data present, scope gap; per RULE B, coverage/constraint is the single worst dim — scored as G (sparse near-castle options).

improvement_hint: Tighten city search to Matsumoto city core vs Azumi/Kamikochi area; add proximity-to-landmark scoring.

reasoning: Query asks for ryokan near Ise Jingu and Okage Yokocho. However おかげ横丁 proximity is not specified, and business-style accommodations (ビジネス旅館 若草) dominate. Several listings lack key details. Authoritative data present, partial scope per RULE C.

improvement_hint: Add landmark proximity scoring for 内宮/おかげ横丁; improve ryokan differentiation by lodging tier (traditional vs business).

reasoning: Query is in Thai asking for romantic onsen accommodation in Tohoku. Response returns Akita (one Tohoku prefecture) onsen ryokan in Japanese/English (RULE D: Thai query → no Thai content, -1 on constraint_handling). The hito_yu_kai confirmed entries are authoritative and Tohoku-relevant. However scope is only Akita, while query said 東北地方 (Tohoku region = 6 prefectures). reasoning: Query asks for honeymoon spots in Amanohashidate beyond 股覗き, plus accommodation. Response correctly retrieves 宮津市 spots including 宮津天橋立文化的景観 (Important Cultural Landscape), 阿蘇海 (lagoon with couple suitable_for), Catholic Miyazu Church. No accommodation returned (get_spots tool, not get_hotels). Named Amanohashidate spot itself absent from truncated view. Authoritative data present, RULE C applies — scope partial.

reasoning: Query asks about Japan Heritage stories connected to Nikko for an anniversary cultural tour. Response uses get_japan_heritage for Tochigi and returns 4 heritage entries including Rinno-ji, Nikko Toshogu (with coordinates, hours, website), Shrines and Temples of Nikko (UNESCO WHS), and Banna-ji. Toshogu directly matches the Nikko intent. Tool scope note correctly distinguishes Japan Heritage from UNESCO. All data authoritative and specific. Minor caveat: 日本遺産 narrative stories (the 'serial' story designation) are not listed as such — the response returns wikidata_heritage records rather than the 日本遺産 serial story format, which may confuse a strict Japan Heritage query.
missing_data: Dedicated 日本遺産 serial story narratives for Tochigi if any exist separately from Wikidata heritage records.
improvement_hint: Clarify in tool output whether Tochigi has a dedicated 日本遺産 story designation or if the wikidata_heritage fallback is the only result; add story narrative text when available.

reasoning: Query asks for sights in Hagi's 武家屋敷 (samurai district) for a couple walk. Response returns only 山口県観光サイト (yamaguchi-tourism.jp) generic portal pages for events/spots across Yamaguchi prefecture — Iwakuni air base event, Yamaguchi city lantern festival, Yanai goldfish lanterns, Motonosumi Shrine (Nagato city), Akiyoshidai (Mine city). None of these are in Hagi. The retrieval assigned these to municipality_code 352047 (Hagi) but content is completely unrelated to Hagi. Worst dim: intent_understanding — Hagi content entirely absent.
missing_data: Hagi-specific spots: 武家屋敷 (Kikuya / Mori family), 萩城跡, 松下村塾, 明倫学舎; ryokan in Hagi.
wrong_data: All listed content (岩国基地, 山口市ちょうちん祭, 柳井金魚ちょうちん, 元乃隅神社, 秋吉台, 壇ノ浦) is in other cities, not Hagi.
improvement_hint: Fix municipality tag mapping: yamaguchi-tourism.jp portal pages are being incorrectly assigned to Hagi's municipality_code; filter by actual Hagi city content domain or coordinates.

reasoning: Query is in Korean asking for onsen ryokan accessible from Tokyo in 1 night (Atami or Ito preferred). However no hotel is specifically in Atami or Ito (the stated preferences). Language mismatch and location constraint partially missed.

reasoning: Query asks for romantic scenic spots and accommodation on Shodoshima. Response returns only 2 hotels (ホテルグリーンプラザ小豆島, 小豆島グランドホテル) with correct Kagawa/Shodoshima location. Coverage is very sparse — only 2 results, no ryokan. Romantic scenery spots are not included (get_hotels was called, not get_spots). No mention of 二十四の瞳, オリーブ公園, 寒霞渓. Authoritative data, but very thin coverage.

However private bath (貸切風呂) constraint is not addressed, and several returned items are irrelevant (別府競輪場, Wi-Fi page, 観光情報サイトリニューアル). reasoning: Query asks for 白壁土蔵街 in Hida-Furukawa and 一棟貸し accommodation. Response returns spots for 飛騨市 municipality but results are: 奥飛騨温泉郷 (Wikidata, in different municipality), 飛騨国分寺 and its ginkgo (in Takayama, not Hida-Furukawa), and a photo-download admin page. 白壁土蔵街 (the key landmark) is absent. 一棟貸し accommodation not returned. reasoning: Query is in Chinese asking for ocean-view onsen ryokan in Atami for a honeymoon with private baths. Response uses get_hotels filtered to Atami city + onsen_ryokan type, returning 2 confirmed hotels (熱海温泉 湯宿一番地, 熱海温泉ホテル 夢いろは) with websites — both genuine Atami onsen hotels. Data is authoritative and scope is correct. Main caveats: only 2 results (sparse coverage), no Chinese-language content, private bath attribute absent. Per RULE D, Chinese query returned non-Chinese data: -1 on constraint_handling from otherwise 4. Not worst enough to drop below null failure category since data is genuinely useful.

reasoning: Query asks for romantic ryokan near Mt. Aso with crater views. Response returns Kumamoto hotels filtered to Aso area: 奥阿蘇の宿やまなみ (hito_yu_kai, Sanmaura area), Fairfield by Marriott Kumamoto Aso (with coordinates and website), 阿蘇の司ビラパーク, 阿蘇白水温泉瑠璃. Per RULE C, partial scope gap.
missing_data: Crater-view attribute or proximity to 阿蘇山火口; ryokan specifically in 阿蘇市 vs 南阿蘇村 disambiguation; couple/honeymoon amenity info.

reasoning: Query is in Arabic asking for best hot springs and scenery in Hakone for a romantic trip. Response returns Kanagawa/Hakone spots in Japanese/English — no Arabic content (RULE D: -1 on constraint_handling from otherwise 3). Response returns Saga prefecture onsen_ryokan with only 4 results: 伊万里温泉 (different city, ~40 km from Ureshino), 佐賀大和温泉 (Saga city area), 和多屋別荘 (33.09°N, 129.98°E — this matches Ureshino area), 武雄温泉ユースホステル (武雄, different onsen). Only one hotel (和多屋別荘) is in Ureshino; others are in different Saga spa towns. Ureshino-specific filtering and the silk-water characteristic are not addressed. RULE B: constraint_handling worst dim (city + feature gap).
